title: Oneblock
description: A "Oneblock" is a variant of the popular game Minecraft. In this mode, players start on a single floating block in the void.
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) **Oneblock** is a server-side Data Pack / Mod that add a variant of the popular game Minecraft, designed as a challenge for players. In this mode, players start on a single floating block in the void. ## 📌 Goals The goal is to survive and thrive starting from this one block: **🛠️ Building**: Expand your island by creating structures, farms, and automation systems. **🍃 Survival**: Manage limited resources, avoid falling into the void, and deal with any mobs that might spawn. **👷‍♀️ Progression**: Advance through the various phases of the game by gathering increasingly advanced resources. ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) **Starting** **Block**: The player begins on a single block of dirt or another material. This block is the only thing preventing the player from falling into the void. **Block Regeneration**: When the player breaks the initial block, another block appears in its place. These blocks can be of different types (dirt, wood, stone, ores, etc.) and sometimes generate useful resources or items. # Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you – whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a21d1c453796757f5e27ce9b94e648664755964_0.webp)![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8b289a15c3eee79a8540f279e3486f6e7e22fc.png) ## Other links [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1939f49bcb6e53e1f7c526c007eeb1be4a69aeb2.png)‎](https://it.fiverr.com/diesse2007) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/169f5456fb11650701a2af7890b911e62386388e_0.webp)‎](https://x.com/dskianto) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c38479243db42f491e3674a0ccda6de2c934b7f.png)‎](https://wanmine.net/)
